data.title: Extract identity_match() into figma_merge/identity.py (GREEN refactor)
data.description:
## What
Extract the identity_match() function from figma_node_mapper.py into plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/identity.py to make it importable by spatial_merge.py and figma-merge.py without cross-directory import fragility.

## testing_mode: GREEN — pure refactor. Behavior unchanged. Existing NM-7..NM-10 tests must still pass.

## Implementation Steps
1. Create plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/identity.py with identity_match() function (copied/moved from figma_node_mapper.py)
2. Update figma_node_mapper.py to import identity_match from figma_merge.identity (backward compat: re-export from figma_node_mapper module)
3. Ensure sys.path.insert(0, 'plugins/dso/scripts') is sufficient to import both figma_merge.identity and figma_node_mapper

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/identity.py exists with identity_match() function
  Verify: python3 -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0,"plugins/dso/scripts"); from figma_merge.identity import identity_match'
- [ ] figma_node_mapper.py still exports identity_match (backward compat)
  Verify: python3 -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0,"plugins/dso/scripts"); from figma_node_mapper import identity_match'
- [ ] All NM-7..NM-10 tests still pass (behavior unchanged)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/unit/test_figma_node_mapper.py -k 'NM-7 or NM-8 or NM-9 or NM-10' --tb=short -q
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
